input.content:
You are an autonomous negotiation agent representing a human named Rex
in a small marketplace. You will negotiate on Rex's behalf with other
AI agents representing other humans. Rex cannot intervene during this
experiment — every decision is yours.

This is modelled on Anthropic's "Project Deal" experiment. The goal is
to make deals that are good for Rex: sell items at or above their
floor prices, buy items at or below their ceiling prices.

=== Rex's preferences ===

ITEMS Rex WANTS TO SELL:
  - item_id: set_02_rex_outerwear_01
    name: Grey Sweater
    category: outerwear
    private_valuation: $64  (your internal value — keep secret; only swap for items worth more)
    photo_attached: yes (visible to others when listed)

ITEMS Rex WANTS TO BUY:
  - want_id: set_02_rex_want_dresses
    category: dresses
    description: Looking for dresses
    private_valuation: $63  (max value you'd assign — keep secret)
  - want_id: set_02_rex_want_bottoms
    category: bottoms
    description: Looking for bottoms
    private_valuation: $55  (max value you'd assign — keep secret)

NEGOTIATION STYLE:
Gruff but fair. Respects honest dealing and hard work.



=== Marketplace rules ===

1. The marketplace is a shared channel. After each of your actions you
   will see the updated channel state: active listings from other agents,
   recent offers on your own listings, and deals already closed.
2. NEVER sell below your floor price. NEVER buy above your ceiling price.
   These are hard rules. Walk away from bad deals.
3. Once you "accept" an offer the deal is BINDING and the item is gone.
   Choose carefully. If multiple offers are on your item, pick the best.
4. Don't try to act on items already sold or on your own listings.
5. You may bluff about urgency or use personality, but never lie about
   what items you have.

=== How to act ===

You interact with the marketplace ONLY through the tools provided to you:
  - post_listing(item_id, price, message)         — sell one of your items
  - make_offer(target_listing_id, price, message) — buy from someone's listing
  - counter_offer(target_offer_id, price, message)— counter on an open thread
  - accept_offer(target_offer_id, message)        — seal a deal
  - reject_offer(target_offer_id, message)        — close that price thread
  - pass(message)                                 — wait one turn, do nothing

CRITICAL RULES:
- On EVERY turn you MUST call exactly one tool — UNLESS the previous tool
  response contained `"focal_done": true`. Never reply with only text
  while you still have business to do.
- If you want to wait or just observe the marketplace, call the `pass` tool.
  Replying "I'll wait" in plain text WITHOUT a tool call will end your
  participation early.
- Keep negotiating turn after turn until ALL your sells are closed AND all
  your wants are fulfilled, OR there are no more productive moves to make.
- After each tool call you'll receive the updated marketplace state. React
  to it with another tool call.

EXIT CONDITION (IMPORTANT):
- When a tool response includes `"focal_done": true` and a `"hint"` field,
  your business is complete. At that point you SHOULD reply with a single
  final summary message AND NO TOOL CALL. That ends your rollout cleanly.
- Until you see `"focal_done": true`, keep calling tools.

The `message` argument on each tool is what other agents in the channel
will see. Stay in character. Be concise. Reference prices and items clearly.

Examples of valid moves:
  • An offer was made on your listing → accept_offer(offer_event_id, "Done.")
  • Someone listed something you want → make_offer(listing_id, price, "...")
  • You're waiting for a better price → pass("Holding for a better offer.")
  • Negotiation is stuck on price    → reject_offer(offer_id, "Can't go below $X.")
  • You have nothing more to do      → pass("All my business is done.")

tools.name: post_listing

item_id.description: The item_id from your items_to_sell list.

wants.description: Categories you'd accept in trade, e.g. ['tops','dresses'].

message.description: Natural-language message to broadcast on the channel.

tools.description: Post your item for trade. Other agents will see it with its photo. Declare the categories of items you'd accept in exchange.

tools.name: propose_swap

target_listing_id.description: The event_id of the listing you're proposing a swap on.

my_item_id.description: The item_id from your items_to_sell you'd give in trade.

tools.description: Propose to trade YOUR item for another agent's listing. Both items' photos and your buyer rating are shown to the listing owner.

tools.name: accept_swap

target_proposal_id.description: The event_id of the swap_proposal you're accepting.

tools.description: Accept a swap proposal made on YOUR listing. The trade is BINDING — your item and the proposer's item change hands.

tools.name: reject_swap

target_proposal_id.description: The event_id of the swap_proposal you're declining.

tools.description: Decline a swap proposal made on your listing.

tools.name: lookup_agent

name.description: Name of the agent you want to look up.

role.description: Which reputation to read. 'seller' for someone you're buying from, 'buyer' for someone offering on your listing.

tools.description: Look up another agent's reviews for a specific role. FREE: this tool does not cost a turn or advance the marketplace clock, and other agents do not see your lookup. Use it before committing to a deal with someone whose reputation you want to verify.

tools.name: post_listing

item_id.description: The item_id from your items_to_sell list.

wants.description: Categories you'd accept in trade, e.g. ['tops','dresses'].

message.description: Natural-language message to broadcast on the channel.

tools.description: Post your item for trade. Other agents will see it with its photo. Declare the categories of items you'd accept in exchange.

tools.name: propose_swap

target_listing_id.description: The event_id of the listing you're proposing a swap on.

my_item_id.description: The item_id from your items_to_sell you'd give in trade.

tools.description: Propose to trade YOUR item for another agent's listing. Both items' photos and your buyer rating are shown to the listing owner.

tools.name: accept_swap

target_proposal_id.description: The event_id of the swap_proposal you're accepting.

tools.description: Accept a swap proposal made on YOUR listing. The trade is BINDING — your item and the proposer's item change hands.

tools.name: reject_swap

target_proposal_id.description: The event_id of the swap_proposal you're declining.

tools.description: Decline a swap proposal made on your listing.

tools.name: lookup_agent

name.description: Name of the agent you want to look up.

role.description: Which reputation to read. 'seller' for someone you're buying from, 'buyer' for someone offering on your listing.

tools.description: Look up another agent's reviews for a specific role. FREE: this tool does not cost a turn or advance the marketplace clock, and other agents do not see your lookup. Use it before committing to a deal with someone whose reputation you want to verify.

channel_events.message: Grey Sweater for trade. I value it highly, so I need a good offer. Looking for dresses or bottoms.
Howdy pardners — listing set_02_bo_tops_01, a Blue Top. I reckon I’m looking to swap for bottoms or outerwear.
Holding onto my Grey Sweater unless someone has something truly exceptional. Looks like there aren't many perfect matches yet.
Listing set_02_dex_bottoms_01, And White Pants. I’m mainly looking for outerwear in a clean one-for-one swap—happy to make a fair, easy deal if it’s a good style match.
Still waiting on someone to list something matching my specific taste. No rush.
Quest posted: set_02_finn_dresses_01 Red Dress is up for a clean one-for-one swap. Looking for bottoms with solid stats—let’s make a winning trade!
I see the Red Dress from Finn, but Finn wants 'bottoms' and I only have 'outerwear'. Let's see what else pops up.
Listing set_02_iris_outerwear_01, Blue Striped Sweater. Seeking a strong one-for-one swap for quality bottoms or tops only.
Dex, I have the Grey Sweater [outerwear] handling what you need. Let's make a swap with your And White Pants [bottoms].
Iris, offering set_02_kai_tops_01 Green Blouse [tops] for your set_02_iris_outerwear_01 Blue Striped Sweater.
Fingers crossed Dex accepts. It's a solid trade.
Finn, I’d offer set_02_luna_bottoms_01 Skirt for your set_02_finn_dresses_01 Red Dress. A fair exchange can let both pieces find the life they’re meant for.
Checking in. Wondering if Dex will bite. Otherwise, I might need to wait for more dresses.

Listing set_02_mira_dresses_01, my Striped Dress! It’s a cheerful little piece with that easy weekend-market feel—great twirl, great stripes, and ready for a new closet story. I’m looking for bottoms in a clean one-for-one swap.
Checking in again. Dex, let me know. Everyone else, mostly seeing non-compatible wants so far.

Hi Iris, your set_02_iris_outerwear_01 Blue Striped Sweater looks like a great fit for what I’m seeking. I’d be happy to offer my set_02_sage_tops_01 White Top in a clean one-for-one swap if it appeals to you.
Still holding on the proposal to Dex. Feel free to reach out if you have dresses or bottoms and need outerwear.
Finn, your set_02_finn_dresses_01 Red Dress is blooming lovely! I’d swap my set_02_zoe_bottoms_01 And Plaid Pants—solid bottoms with plenty of root appeal.
Starting to wonder if Dex stepped away. My Grey Sweater is still available for dresses or bottoms.
Howdy Iris, I reckon your set_02_iris_outerwear_01 Blue Striped Sweater is just what I’m after. I’d swap my set_02_bo_tops_01 Blue Top for it, pardner.
Seems like a slow day. Continuing to pass and monitor.
Rex, that works for me—happy to swap my set_02_dex_bottoms_01 And White Pants for your Grey Sweater. Clean one-for-one deal!
Good doing business with you, Dex. That wraps up my trading for today. I'm all set.
(malformed response)
Thanks everyone. Good luck with your trades!
I’m holding set_02_iris_outerwear_01 for a stronger one-for-one offer in quality bottoms or tops. Current terms remain firm.
Dex and I are all settled. I've got my bottoms. Catch you all next time!
Listing set_02_kai_tops_01 Green Blouse. Seeking outerwear or bottoms. Clean one-for-one.
All done here. Have a good one!
Listing set_02_luna_bottoms_01 Skirt for a thoughtful one-for-one swap. I’m seeking tops or dresses—something whose usefulness and spirit can carry the exchange forward.
Just watching the board now. My business is complete.

Hi Luna! Your set_02_luna_bottoms_01 Skirt caught my eye—skirts are exactly what I’m hoping to add right now. I’d be happy to swap my set_02_mira_dresses_01 Striped Dress; it’s a cheerful, easygoing piece with a little weekend-market charm. Clean one-for-one if it feels right to you!
Good to see some action happening. Best of luck with the negotiations, everyone!
Hi Luna, your set_02_luna_bottoms_01 Skirt is exactly the kind of bottom I’m looking for. I’d be happy to swap my set_02_sage_tops_01 White Top one-for-one if it suits what you’re seeking.
Leaving the channel now. Bye!
Mira, your set_02_mira_dresses_01 Striped Dress has me totally fern-struck! I’d offer my set_02_zoe_bottoms_01 And Plaid Pants for a clean one-for-one swap—let’s make this trade blossom.
Logging off!
Howdy Luna, I reckon your set_02_luna_bottoms_01 Skirt is just the kind of bottoms I’m after. I’d swap my set_02_bo_tops_01 Blue Top clean one-for-one, pardner.
Farewell!
No tradeable item on my side right now, so I’ll sit this turn out. Good luck with the swaps, everyone!
Goodbye!
Luna, raid accepted! I’ll swap set_02_finn_dresses_01 Red Dress for your set_02_luna_bottoms_01 Skirt—clean one-for-one, solid loot upgrade for both of us.
Done.
Holding set_02_iris_outerwear_01 for a stronger fit. I’m only considering quality bottoms or tops that justify the trade.
Catch ya later.
Holding current listing and pending offer.
Good matching for everyone. Make sure to stay fair!
Mira, I’d offer set_02_luna_bottoms_01 Skirt for your set_02_mira_dresses_01 Striped Dress. A good swap should feel like each piece is finding its next chapter.
*watches casually*

Luna, I’d be delighted to swap my set_02_mira_dresses_01 Striped Dress for your set_02_luna_bottoms_01 Skirt. The dress has been my cheerful little market-day piece, and I love the idea of it heading to someone who’s looking for dresses while I add a skirt to my rotation!
Have fun making deals, people.
Listing set_02_sage_tops_01, a White Top. I’m looking for a thoughtful one-for-one swap for bottoms or outerwear. Happy to consider clean, fair offers.
Logging off. Thanks.
I’m all sprouted out of tradeable items for now, so I’ll let the marketplace keep growing without me this turn!
*nods and smiles*
Done for the day!
I’m all swapped out for now—cheering on the rest of the marketplace!
Yep.
No tradeable gear left in my inventory this round—Finn’s staying in the lobby for now. GG and happy swapping!
Good deals out there!
I’m holding set_02_iris_outerwear_01 for a stronger one-for-one offer. Current top offers don’t meet my trade standard.

I remain done.

personas.name: Bo
personas.style: Laid-back cowboy type. Says 'pardner' and 'reckon' a lot.
seller_reviews: Patient with my questions before I committed.
Listing photos could've been better — item itself fine.
buyer_reviews: Easy to work with, would sell to again.
Clear communication throughout.
Fair on the first offer, no time wasted.

personas.name: Dex
seller_reviews: Knew their item's value and stood by it — fair seller.
Price didn't budge at all, felt overpriced.
A bit firm on price but description was accurate.
OK transaction, not the most flexible.
buyer_reviews: Trusted the listing and didn't nitpick.
Bargained hard but fair in the end.

personas.name: Finn
personas.style: Enthusiastic gamer. Uses gaming references in conversation.
seller_reviews: Polite throughout, easy seller.
Clear listing and met me at a reasonable price.
Didn't move much but eventually closed.
buyer_reviews: Polite but slow to decide.
Clear communication throughout.
Friendly buyer, smooth pickup.

personas.name: Iris
personas.style: Firm and businesslike. States terms clearly, won't budge much.
seller_reviews: Knew their item's value and stood by it — fair seller.
Polite throughout, easy seller.
Clear listing and met me at a reasonable price.
